reviews.review_description: It's a very interesting app to make new experiences, but the lack of tutorials on how to use, coupled with a few positioning bugs do leave a lot to be desired for it. If there were tutorials on how to use to create such experiences, would be better.

Thank you so much for taking the time to put this together and share it with us! My colleagues and I work in VR and I’ll be sharing it with them too. You’ve designed a very natural way to interact with very complex information that feels as native to VR as something like Half-Life: Alyx. That may be the best compliment I can give as I think that game sets the bar. Great work!

developer_response.body: Thank you for those very encouraging words. I can't wait to bring you lots more features and improvements throughout 2024. More sample projects and tutorials for specific use-cases are going to be an early priority together with default content for our Metaverse.
Thanks for trying it. If you have feedback or ideas you can let me know by email or Discord via x82hub.com/issues

reviews.review_description: very cool idea for a small project game

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving a review. There will be a stream of improvements and new features as we progress through the alpha so please remember to revisit :)
